serverErrors.cronTooFrequent: This cron schedule runs too frequently (minimum interval is 5 minutes).

serverErrors.schedulePinnedSchemaRequired: Schedules are only supported for workflows with a pinned payload schema.
serverErrors.scheduleSchemaNotRegistered: The latest published workflow version does not have a registered pinned payload schema.
serverErrors.schedulePayloadInvalid: The schedule payload failed validation against the workflow payload schema.
